title: NSF Funding Opportunities for Early-Career Researchers — Seminar Slides (PRISSEM)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-04-13 New Faculty Development Seminar 'NSF Funding Opportunities for Early-Career Researchers', presented by Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Companion / predecessor to the 2024-02-15 PRISSEM NSF early-career seminar. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/mZa6N5uO5xgc559B_JaRmPqOxZKboanqutwP7b_cgbtbfAY-tIpP1UGwInOmjD4N.nb0izOHIPe_MeKJ3
